title: Expanded activity tracking with granular status, platform, lead, sheet, task, and project change events
details: Client status and platform changes now show old and new values instead of generic 'Company details updated'
Lead additions and removals on clients are now tracked separately
Sheet creation and deletion are now recorded in the activity log
Task and project field edits (title, assignees, dates, etc.) are now tracked
New client creation is recorded as the first activity entry

title: Redesigned This Week page with day detail view
details: Compact week overview strip with stacked bars showing event density per day
Click any day to see a detailed 3-column breakdown: Project Events, Events & Tasks, and Team
Team column shows time-off, workload indicators, and birthdays
Project Gantt timeline moved to the top of the page

title: Fix: Delivery task now appears in project task list
details: Delivery tasks are now created as project-level tasks so they appear in the Open tasks list
Previously, delivery tasks were created at the client level and were invisible on the project page

title: Archive employees
details: Archive an employee to remove them from all client leads, task assignments, and future time-off
Impact preview shows exactly what will change before you confirm
Archived employees can no longer log in
Reactivate an archived employee at any time (assignments must be re-added manually)
Historical records (logs, activity, completed tasks) are preserved

title: Team page with holiday calendar
details: New 'Team' page accessible from the sidebar with a monthly wallchart calendar
Log time off for yourself or team members with half-day support
Leave balance overview showing vacation allowance vs. days used
Configurable leave types and company holidays via Admin > Labels and Types
Company-wide holidays highlighted on the calendar

title: New 'My Day' personal dashboard
details: Personal landing page showing your overdue and today's tasks, open follow-ups, project overview, and upcoming deadlines
Complete tasks and mark follow-ups done directly from the dashboard
Projects section shows progress bars for clients you lead
Now the default page when you open the app

title: New 'This Week' team dashboard
details: Weekly calendar view with Mon-Fri day columns showing events, milestones, and deadlines
Filter by event type with toggle pills (Deadlines, Deliveries, Kick-offs, Follow-ups, Events)
Navigate between weeks with arrow buttons
Active projects Gantt timeline below the calendar
Dashboard is now the default landing page

title: Configurable lead permissions per role
details: Each role now defines two permission sets: Global (everywhere) and Lead (on assigned clients only)
Role editor shows both sections with grouped checkboxes
Lead permissions use union model: global OR (lead + lead permission) — no conflicts
Default member lead permissions match previous behavior (edit client, create/edit/kickoff projects)

title: Tabbed employee profile editor with self-service access
details: Employee edit page now uses tabbed navigation: Identity & Personal, Employment, System Access, and Notes
Sticky header stays visible while scrolling through tab content
Members can edit their own profile (name, avatar, phone, emergency contact) via the avatar menu
Admin users retain full access to all tabs when editing any employee

title: Roles & permissions system
details: Create custom roles with granular permissions from the admin panel
35+ permissions across clients, projects, tasks, logs, events, employees, and admin features
Two built-in system roles (Admin, Member) with editable permissions
Assign any role to employees when inviting or editing their profile
Lead-based and creator-based access checks preserved alongside role permissions

title: Scrollable event history on Events tab
details: Events tab now shows past events (completed tasks, followed-up logs, past milestones, past custom events)
Scroll up to browse event history up to one year back
Today is auto-scrolled into view on load
Past events shown with muted styling to distinguish from upcoming events

title: Employee management replaces user management
details: Admin 'Users' section is now 'Employees' with invitation-only access
Rich employee profiles: personal details, employment info, contract data, emergency contacts
Admins can invite employees by email — account auto-activates on first Google login
Admin-controlled display name and avatar overrides (Google values imported automatically)
Dedicated employee detail page with full profile editor
Role-based access: Admin and Member roles (replaces simple admin toggle)
Employee status tracking: Invited, Active, Inactive

title: Release notes and Settings page
details: New Info section on the Settings page displays a running changelog of app updates

title: Project kick-off workflow
details: Projects now have a two-phase lifecycle: draft and kicked off
New Kick Off button lets you set delivery date, sold price, and label before a project goes live
Projects track scheduledStartDate, scheduledEndDate, and kickedOffAt
Admins can reset a project back to draft via the edit modal

title: Gantt timeline views
details: New interactive Gantt chart component with collapsible sections and horizontal scroll
Clients overview now includes a timeline view showing all projects across clients
Individual client pages show a project timeline on the Projects tab

title: Clients overview table (admin)
details: Admins see a new Overview tab on the clients page with a sortable data table
Columns include status, open tasks, open projects, last activity, and next event
Reusable DataTable component with column sorting, sticky columns, and horizontal scroll

title: Service check-in timers
details: Services and client statuses now support a configurable check-in interval (days)
The overview dashboard uses the status-specific timer instead of a fixed 60-day window
Automated expiry detection creates log entries with follow-up tasks when a service timer lapses
New system event types: Follow-up and Expired service

title: Stepped modal and shared form components
details: New SteppedModal component for multi-step wizards with step indicators and fixed footer
Add Project and Edit Project now use modals instead of the right panel
ServicePills component for selecting services via pill buttons
Shared form-styles utility for consistent input/label styling across all forms

title: Project template enhancements
details: Templates now support default description, default sold price, and default delivery days
Template editor uses the new stepped modal with inline task management
Selecting a template pre-fills all project fields during creation

title: Client management improvements
details: Admins can delete clients directly from the edit form
Edit client form now passes isAdmin flag for conditional UI
Logbook entries can be linked to a service for expiry tracking
New --bg-elevated CSS variable for subtle surface differentiation
